what_it_does: Records a design decision to decline adding structured workflow metadata to comment envelopes.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, board:// address, type block, source claude_code, state current, title P12, and a part_of link to item-f9f4a6a6.
Created and updated timestamps are identical, with a single history entry noting it was filed.
Body lists proposed additions: intent enum, priority, received/working/applied status, proposed-change diff preview, and stale-target detection.
The item argues that prose already lets a lead infer intent, so structured workflow should wait until envelope volume makes prose routing fail.
Diff previews before landing are called a genuinely nice future feature but too large to build this week.
standouts: Explicit ❌ rejection of the BD-D additions.
Deferral rationale tied to volume threshold rather than principle.
Acknowledgment that diff preview is desirable but out of current scope.
conventions: Follows the noticeboard item schema with YAML frontmatter and markdown body.
Uses board:// URI addressing and a part_of link to a parent item.
Markdown heading mirrors the truncated title.
concerns: No explicit decision owner or approval signature beyond source claude_code.
Created and updated timestamps are the same, which is expected for an initial filing but leaves no edit trail.
notes: A noticeboard item rejecting the addition of structured intent/priority/status/diff-preview workflow fields to comment envelopes for now.
questions: What is the content of the parent item-f9f4a6a6?
Who are 'Tim' and 'the lead' in this context?
What specific volume threshold would justify reconsidering this decision?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches content: it documents why the listed envelope additions are not being pursued now.
intention_signals: To keep the comment envelope lightweight and avoid bolting on a workflow-management system until the volume of envelopes makes prose-based routing fail.
novelty: Explicit rejection of a feature set framed as premature, while still acknowledging one piece as genuinely desirable later.
contribution: Preserves the rationale for not expanding the envelope schema with workflow metadata and the volume-based threshold principle for when expansion might be reconsidered.
summary_for_embedding: A current noticeboard item recording the decision to decline adding intent tags, priority, status lifecycle, diff previews, versioning, and audit-trail fields to comment envelopes because prose routing suffices at current volume and diff previews are a future large build.
intention_for_embedding: To document why structured workflow metadata should not be added to the envelope yet and the conditions under which it might be reconsidered.
